title: henckelia alba
intro: Henckelia alba, also known as the White Ghost Pipe or White Ghost Orchid, is a rare and unique plant native to the Himalayan region of Asia. This epiphytic plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Henckelia alba include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Henckelia alba can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or powder, and is often used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to promote overall well-being.
